title: Real-Time Pricing Feature Platform
summary: Serve low-latency pricing and demand features to ranking and pricing models while tracking freshness and training-serving consistency.
knowledge_base: User: pricing science and ML platform teams.
Primary pain: online pricing features drift or go stale before the model can act.
Decision output: refresh, fallback, or release feature updates to production models.
Business impact: better pricing quality and more reliable real-time decisions.

app_modules.label: Price 01
app_modules.title: Feature Freshness Score
app_modules.description: Score the readiness of a real-time feature vector before pricing inference.

app_modules.label: Price 02
app_modules.title: Consistency Review
app_modules.description: Compare the online feature view against the last offline training snapshot.

app_modules.label: Price 03
app_modules.title: Platform Memo
app_modules.description: Draft the next action for the pricing platform and merchandising teams.
